svg.title: SVG Image created as ministepper-Stepper 1.svg date 2026-04-14T19:51:44

g.style: fill:#000000; fill-opacity:1.0000;stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:1.0000; stroke-linecap:round; stroke-linejoin:round;

g.text: Reusable one-channel stepper driver — instantiate twice on ministepper root

g.desc: Reusable one-channel stepper driver — instantiate twice on ministepper root

g.style: fill:#FFFFC2; fill-opacity:1.0000; stroke:none;

g.text: Components to wire in KiCad (placed unwired here):

g.desc: Components to wire in KiCad (placed unwired here):

g.text: RSA_M, RSB_M 0.68 ohm 1210 DNP (sense, micro variant)

g.desc: RSA_M, RSB_M 0.68 ohm 1210 DNP (sense, micro variant)

g.text: C_VS_BULK 10 uF 50V 1210 (motor supply bulk near VS pins 16+31)

g.desc: C_VS_BULK 10 uF 50V 1210 (motor supply bulk near VS pins 16+31)

g.text: C_CP 22 nF 50V 0402 (CPH<->CPL charge pump flying cap)

g.desc: C_CP 22 nF 50V 0402 (CPH<->CPL charge pump flying cap)

g.text: R_DIAG1 47 k 0402 pull-up to +3V3 on DIAG1

g.desc: R_DIAG1 47 k 0402 pull-up to +3V3 on DIAG1

g.text: STANDARD populated: RSA/RSB = 0.1 ohm 1210 (NEMA17-class, up to 1.5A RMS)

g.desc: STANDARD populated: RSA/RSB = 0.1 ohm 1210 (NEMA17-class, up to 1.5A RMS)

g.text: Only ONE pair should be populated at a time. The micro variant requires

g.desc: Only ONE pair should be populated at a time. The micro variant requires

g.text: the firmware to set CHOPCONF.VSENSE=1 (see firmware/tsumikoro-ministepper).

g.desc: the firmware to set CHOPCONF.VSENSE=1 (see firmware/tsumikoro-ministepper).

g.text: Strapping (firmware-agnostic, tied via power symbols inside this sheet):

g.desc: Strapping (firmware-agnostic, tied via power symbols inside this sheet):

g.text: This sheet represents a single channel of TMC2130 motor driving with

g.desc: This sheet represents a single channel of TMC2130 motor driving with

g.text: all the per-driver support passives from the datasheet.

g.desc: all the per-driver support passives from the datasheet.

g.text: Instantiate this sheet twice on the ministepper root — KiCad auto-

g.desc: Instantiate this sheet twice on the ministepper root — KiCad auto-

g.text: renumbers refs per instance (U1->U1/U2, C1->C1/C13, R1->R1/R8, etc.).

g.desc: renumbers refs per instance (U1->U1/U2, C1->C1/C13, R1->R1/R8, etc.).

g.text: SCK, MOSI, MISO, DRV_ENN - shared SPI bus + shared enable

g.desc: SCK, MOSI, MISO, DRV_ENN - shared SPI bus + shared enable

g.text: CS, STEP, DIR, DIAG1 - per-channel signals

g.desc: CS, STEP, DIR, DIAG1 - per-channel signals

g.text: MOT_A+/-, MOT_B+/- - bipolar motor phases to JMOTx

g.desc: MOT_A+/-, MOT_B+/- - bipolar motor phases to JMOTx
